'''ân-f-k-z''' ('''kanafkezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cuspidate|cuspidate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-f-k-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cuspidate|cuspidate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-f-k-z
|-
! Lemma
| kanafkezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinafkezoko|thinafkezoko]] || [[word:jinafkezoko|jinafkezoko]] || [[word:shinafkezoko|shinafkezoko]] || [[word:kinafkezoko|kinafkezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunafkezoko|thuthunafkezoko]] || [[word:jujunafkezoko|jujunafkezoko]] || [[word:shushunafkezoko|shushunafkezoko]] || [[word:kukunafkezoko|kukunafkezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunafkezoko|thunafkezoko]] || [[word:junafkezoko|junafkezoko]] || [[word:shunafkezoko|shunafkezoko]] || [[word:kunafkezoko|kunafkezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunafkezoko|thunafkezoko]] || [[word:junafkezoko|junafkezoko]] || [[word:shunafkezoko|shunafkezoko]] || [[word:kunafkezoko|kunafkezoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenafkezoko|thenafkezoko]] || [[word:jenafkezoko|jenafkezoko]] || [[word:shenafkezoko|shenafkezoko]] || [[word:kenafkezoko|kenafkezoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonafkezoko|thothonafkezoko]] || [[word:jojonafkezoko|jojonafkezoko]] || [[word:shoshonafkezoko|shoshonafkezoko]] || [[word:kokonafkezoko|kokonafkezoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonafkezoko|thonafkezoko]] || [[word:jonafkezoko|jonafkezoko]] || [[word:shonafkezoko|shonafkezoko]] || [[word:konafkezoko|konafkezoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonafkezoko|thonafkezoko]] || [[word:jonafkezoko|jonafkezoko]] || [[word:shonafkezoko|shonafkezoko]] || [[word:konafkezoko|konafkezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnafkezoko|thĂŠnafkezoko]] || [[word:jĂŠnafkezoko|jĂŠnafkezoko]] || [[word:shĂŠnafkezoko|shĂŠnafkezoko]] || [[word:kĂŠnafkezoko|kĂŠnafkezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanafkezoko|thathanafkezoko]] || [[word:jajanafkezoko|jajanafkezoko]] || [[word:shashanafkezoko|shashanafkezoko]] || [[word:kakanafkezoko|kakanafkezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanafkezoko|thanafkezoko]] || [[word:janafkezoko|janafkezoko]] || [[word:shanafkezoko|shanafkezoko]] || [[word:kanafkezoko|kanafkezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanafkezoko|thanafkezoko]] || [[word:janafkezoko|janafkezoko]] || [[word:shanafkezoko|shanafkezoko]] || [[word:kanafkezoko|kanafkezoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
